title: Unforgettable Annapurna Circuit Experience!
text: The entire trip was perfectly organized from start to finish. Our guide was incredibly knowledgeable about the trails and local culture. Reaching Thorong La Pass was tough but worth every step!

title: Breathtaking views, tough high-altitude terrain
text: Amazing scenery and great teahouse accommodations. The itinerary was a bit rushed during the acclimatization days, but the support team handled everything beautifully.

title: Everest Base Camp - A Dream Come True
text: Everything was top-notch! Seeing Everest up close was magical. Our guide checked our oxygen levels every evening, making us feel completely safe throughout the high altitude trek.

title: Great views but overcrowded teahouses
text: The trail itself is magnificent. However, the teahouses booked for us were very crowded and noisy. The guide did his best to shift our rooms, but the management could be better.

title: Disorganized transport and delays
text: The trek layout was beautiful, but our private jeep was delayed by 4 hours on Day 1, cutting our walking window short. Porter assignments were also quite messy at the start.

title: Langtang Valley is a hidden gem!
text: Beautiful culture and peaceful trails compared to Everest. The local cheese factory visit was an amazing addition. Guide was super friendly and translated perfectly.

title: Beautiful Poon Hill Sunrise
text: Short but beautiful trek! The view from Poon Hill at dawn is something I will never forget. Perfect option for beginners or those short on time.

title: Terrible weather management
text: We ran straight into heavy rainfall and landslides. The agency didn't provide clear safety updates or alternative routing options beforehand. Felt very unsafe.

title: Manaslu Circuit was pristine and remote
text: If you want an authentic, uncrowded wild tea-house trek, choose Manaslu. The pass crossing was breathtaking. The agency took care of all restricted area permits flawlessly.

title: Excellent guidance through rough trails
text: The paths around Manaslu can be tricky and narrow, but our guide was extremely careful and helpful. Food choices were simple but hot and fresh.
